close_reason: Created soldeps-gen tool with foundry.toml and package.json parsing
description:
Create cmd/soldeps-gen/ Rust tool that:
- Parses foundry.toml for git-based dependencies (lib/ folder)
- Parses package.json/pnpm-lock.yaml for npm Solidity packages
- Prefetches Nix hashes for both sources
- Outputs solidity-deps.toml with unified format

Reference: cmd/jsdeps-gen/ for npm parsing pattern.

Part of Solidity support (turnkey-ri2t).
title: Create soldeps-gen tool
